case_title: DAVID RIOS et al VS. YONY ALEXIS VELASQUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,222.53 FILED BY RIOS, DAVID TAN, LIJEN AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, YONY ALEXIS ANTONIO MOSCOSO INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RIOS, DAVID TAN, LIJEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTONIO MOSCOSO INSURANCE
SC-104 PROOF OF SERVICE SUBSTITUED SERVICE NO MAILING - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIOS, DAVID TAN, LIJEN AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, YONY ALEXIS ANTONIO MOSCOSO INSURANCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO NOV-16-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT TO BRING HIS OWN INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFT. ANTONIO MOSCOSO INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, YONY ALEXIS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, LIJEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--- ERIKA RUAYZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ANTONIO MOSCOSO INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-16-2012 AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIOS, DAVID TAN, LIJEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELASQUEZ, YONY ALEXIS $9,222.53 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,297.53, PLAINITT'S CLAIM AGAINST ANTONIO MOSCOSO INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT ALLOCATED AS FOLLOWS:-FOR PLAINTIFF LIJEN TAN; $3,046.75. FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID RIOS; $6,175.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
